code: import{useEffect,useRef,useState}from"react";import"./ItemOfferPopupView.scss";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";import{jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export const ItemOfferPopupView=_ref=>{let{item,onAccept,onDeny}=_ref;const popupRef=useRef(null);const[closing,setClosing]=useState(false);const[position,setPosition]=useState(()=>{const saved=localStorage.getItem("item_offer_popup_pos");return saved?JSON.parse(saved):{x:window.innerWidth/2-150,y:window.innerHeight/2-100};});useEffect(()=>{if(!popupRef.current)return;popupRef.current.style.left=`${position.x}px`;popupRef.current.style.top=`${position.y}px`;},[position]);const startDrag=e=>{const startX=e.clientX-position.x;const startY=e.clientY-position.y;const onMove=moveEvent=>{const newPos={x:moveEvent.clientX-startX,y:moveEvent.clientY-startY};setPosition(newPos);};const onUp=()=>{localStorage.setItem("item_offer_popup_pos",JSON.stringify(position));document.removeEventListener("mousemove",onMove);document.removeEventListener("mouseup",onUp);};document.addEventListener("mousemove",onMove);document.addEventListener("mouseup",onUp);};const handleClose=cb=>{setClosing(true);setTimeout(()=>{cb();},200);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{ref:popupRef,className:`item-offer-popup ${closing?"closing":""}`,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"popup-header",onMouseDown:startDrag,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:"Item Offer"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"close-btn",onClick:()=>handleClose(onDeny)})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"popup-body",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:item.icon,alt:item.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:item.name})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"popup-actions",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"accept",onClick:()=>handleClose(onAccept),children:"Accept"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"deny",onClick:()=>handleClose(onDeny),children:"Deny"})]})]});};
